prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约20475名→21671名→21851名→26045名→33835名，整体呈持续后移趋势，尤其2024–2025年后移幅度显著扩大（约77 80名），2025年基准位次约33835名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划持续扩增：2021年52人→2022年88人→2023年92人→2024年96人→2025年102人；2026年计划增至109人，较2025年扩招约6.9%，扩招对录取位次有后移（放宽）作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国药科大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第88名 （2025年第86名），排名稳定在80–90区间，属医药类头部院校；2025年高考周期内该校出现师德师风负面舆情（教师性骚扰学生事件），评价为偏负面，可能 对报考热度产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度排名第90，评价为一般，短视频曝光量中等偏低，未出现高热关注信号；药学学科评估为A+（全国顶尖），中药学等相 关学科实力突出，药学类、临床药学等专业为该校王牌，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 药学/医药类专业社会热度持续偏热，临床医学、口腔医学等医学大 类为高热推荐方向；山东省2026年高考报名总数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增长约5.7%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；省控线（普通类一段）近年稳定在441–444分区间，未 出现大幅波动；中国药科大学位于江苏南京，属长三角地区，对山东考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在山东省招生计划逐年增加，2026年计划109人，占比较往年 持续提升，体现对山东生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划扩招约6.9%（推高位次数字）、山东省考生总数增长约5.7%（加剧竞争，推低 位次数字）以及声誉偏负面轻微抑制热度等因素，在2025年基准33835名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次继续后移，预测位次约35428名，区间34928–35928名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 药学（杰出药学家实验班）
- 药学（拔尖创新班）
- 生物制药（拔尖创新班）
- 中药学（拔尖创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床药学
- 生物技术
- 生物制药
- 药学类（药学、药物制剂、药物分析、药物化学）
- 海洋药学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化工与制药类（制药工程、食品营养与健康、环境科学）
- 中药学类（中药学、中药资源与开发、中药制药）
- 化妆品科学与技术
- 药事管理。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间34928–35928名内，建议以二档专业（药学类、临床药学、生物制药）为主攻方向，一档王牌专业（杰出药学家实验班、拔尖创新班）可作为冲刺目标，三档专业 （化工与制药类、中药学类、化妆品科学与技术、药事管理）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<34928名）可重点冲击一档专业；位次接近区间下限（>35928名）建议以三 档专业为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Comprehensive category in Shandong Province were approximately 20,475 → 21,671 → 21,851 → 26,045 → 33,835, showing a continuous backward trend, especially with a significant increase in the backward shift from 2024 to 2025 (about 7,780 places), with a baseline ranking of about 33,835 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for the Comprehensive category in Shandong Province has been continuously expanding: 52 in 2021 → 88 in 2022 → 92 in 2023 → 96 in 2024 → 102 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 109, an expansion of about 6.9% compared to 2025, which has a backward (relaxing) effect on admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Pharmaceutical University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities is about 88th in 2026 (86th in 2025), stable in the 80–90 range, belonging to the top-tier medical universities; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics (teacher sexual harassment incident), rated as somewhat negative, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; its Douyin popularity ranking is 90th, rated as average, with medium-low short video exposure and no high-attention signals; its pharmacy discipline is rated A+ (top in the country), with strong related disciplines such as Chinese materia medica, and majors like pharmacy and clinical pharmacy are its flagship programs, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of pharmacy/medical majors continues to be relatively high, with clinical medicine, stomatology, and other medical categories being highly recommended directions; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from about 681,000 in 2025, intensifying overall competition due to the expanded candidate pool; the provincial control line (regular batch one) has been stable in the 441–444 point range in recent years, with no significant fluctuations; China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, in the Yangtze River Delta region, which has some regional appeal to Shandong candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province has been increasing year by year, with 109 planned for 2026, accounting for a continuously increasing proportion compared to previous years, reflecting the importance placed on Shandong students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by about 6.9% (pushing the ranking number higher), the increase in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province by about 5.7% (intensifying competition, pushing the ranking number lower), and the slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing enthusiasm, based on the 2025 baseline of 33,835, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to continue moving backward, with a predicted ranking of about 35,428, and a range of 34,928–35,928.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Pharmacy (Outstanding Pharmacist Experimental Class)
- Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class)
- Biopharmaceuticals (Top Innovation Class)
- Chinese Materia Medica (Top Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Clinical Pharmacy
- Biotechnology
- Biopharmaceuticals
- Pharmacy (Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Pharmaceutical Chemistry)
- Marine Pharmacy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering (Pharmaceutical Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health, Environmental Science)
- Chinese Materia Medica (Chinese Materia Medica, Chinese Medicine Resources and Development, Chinese Medicine Pharmaceuticals)
- Cosmetic Science and Technology
- Pharmaceutical Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 34,928–35,928, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Pharmacy, Clinical Pharmacy, Biopharmaceuticals) as the main direction, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Outstanding Pharmacist Experimental Class, Top Innovation Class) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors (Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering, Chinese Materia Medica, Cosmetic Science and Technology, Pharmaceutical Administration) as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<34,928), focus on Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>35,928), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors.
